title: oxalis furcillata var. furcillata
intro: Oxalis furcillata var. furcillata is a type of flowering plant belonging to the Oxalidaceae family, commonly known as the wood sorrel or purple sorrel. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant's leaves and roots are rich in oxalic acid and have been used to treat various health issues, such as digestive problems, fever, and skin conditions, offering benefits like reducing inflammation and improving liver function. Oxalis furcillata var. furcillata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and its leaves and flowers can be used fresh in salads or as a garnish, although proper caution and consultation with a healthcare professional are advised due to its potential toxicity.
